title: Nuka Cola
description: Transform bottles and buckets into Nuka Cola
body:
Transform your ingame buckets and bottles into Nuka Cola from the world of Fallout!

Features:
- Buckets become empty Nuka Cola bottles
- Water and Lava buckets are replaced with Nuka Cola versions
- Milk becomes Nuka Cola (classic)
- All potion models (including splash and lingering) become Nuka Cola
- DOES NOT change any bucket textures besides empty, lava, water and milk
- DOES NOT change some of the potion textures, such as the potion of bad omen

Enjoy your new, refreshing Nuka Cola!
